2605.17144.title: Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST): Unlocking Vision-Language-Action Models through Hidden States
2605.17144.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models leverage powerful perceptual priors from web-scale Vision-Language Model (VLM) pre-training, yet they remain surprisingly brittle in practice, frequently failing at simple robotic tasks. To mitigate this, we propose Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST). COAST builds on the notion of a "conceptor", a linear operator that soft-projects data into the principal components of a target distribution. COAST uses conceptors to identify success-critical subspaces for a target robotic task from a few examples of success and failure rollouts. At inference time, it steers VLA latents into these identified success subspaces to improve task outcomes. Across three architecturally distinct neural policies (flow-matching VLA, autoregressive VLA, and Diffusion Policy), COAST improves absolute mean simulation and real-robot task success rate by over 20 and 40% respectively. The activation subspace geometry reveals that failure modes share substantial structure across tasks while success representations remain largely task-specific. When tasks share similar failure modes, this structure enables previously fitted conceptors to improve performance on new tasks without refitting. Ultimately, our results suggest that current VLAs retain substantial task-relevant knowledge in their latent representations, and that the action expert's decoding bottleneck could be mitigated by steering its residual stream toward task-relevant subspaces. COAST provides a lightweight, training-free path to unlocking these latent capabilities by steering the model towards its own "success" distributions.
2605.17144.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型利用來自網絡規模視覺-語言模型（VLM）預訓練的強大感知先驗，然而在實際應用中，它們仍然令人驚訝地脆弱，經常在簡單的機器人任務中失敗。為了減輕這一問題，我們提出了對比概念激活引導（COAST）。COAST基於“概念器”的概念，這是一種將數據軟投影到目標分佈的主成分的線性運算符。COAST利用概念器從幾個成功和失敗的實例中識別出目標機器人任務的成功關鍵子空間。在推理時，它將VLA潛在變量引導到這些識別出的成功子空間，以改善任務結果。在三種架構上不同的神經策略（流匹配VLA、自回歸VLA和擴散策略）中，COAST分別將絕對平均模擬和真實機器人任務的成功率提高了超過20%和40%。激活子空間幾何顯示，失敗模式在任務之間共享實質結構，而成功表示則在很大程度上保持任務特定性。當任務共享相似的失敗模式時，這種結構使得先前擬合的概念器能夠在新任務上改善性能，而無需重新擬合。最終，我們的結果表明，當前的VLA在其潛在表示中保留了大量與任務相關的知識，並且行動專家的解碼瓶頸可以通過將其殘差流引導到與任務相關的子空間來減輕。COAST提供了一條輕量級、無需訓練的途徑，通過將模型引導到其自身的“成功”分佈來解鎖這些潛在能力。
2605.17144.author: Miranda Muqing Miao et.al.
2605.17144.authors: Miranda Muqing Miao, Subin Kim, Brandon Yang, Lyle Ungar
